positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a whimsical golden retriever puppy chasing giant bubbles in a meadow at twilight. The style is clean, vector-art inspired, with strong, defined silhouettes and limited color palette (deep indigo, lavender, mustard yellow, and creamy white). The puppy should have a dynamic pose, and the bubbles should reflect a celestial, geometric pattern. Composition is centered, utilizing negative space effectively for a modern, high-contrast apparel print. Cinematic, soft edge lighting, flat graphic design aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noisy, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs, low contrast, grain
